subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath hearkened to the call of his Most Glorious Lord and turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon, when most turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع ندآء ربه الابهی و اقبل الی الافق الاعلی اذ اعرض عنه اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
